coreMeaning: in the middle of a group; as one of several
coreImage: 被一群人或事物包围在中间
chineseMeaning: 在……之中；在……当中（三者或以上）
meaning: in the middle of a group; as one of several
fable: 有只小蚂蚁爬进了一袋混合坚果，它在花生、腰果、核桃之间东钻西钻，完全找不到出口。它大喊：'我迷路了！'身边一颗核桃懒洋洋地回答：'你就是 among us，在我们中间啊。'蚂蚁愣了一下，突然觉得被一群坚果包围着……其实还挺温暖的。
moral: among 不是孤立存在，而是被群体包围、身处其中。
memoryHook: among 里藏着 'a mung'（一粒绿豆），掉进了一堆豆子里，被包围在中间——记忆钩子，非词源。
anchorSentence: He felt calm among his teammates before the match.
collocations: among friends / among colleagues / among students
among the best / among the most popular
be counted among / be ranked among
activeChunks: among the most useful tools I've ever used
be ranked among the top developers
sentencePatterns: ... is among the best / most ... I've seen.
Among all the options, ... stands out.
personalExample: English vocabulary review is among the habits I'm trying to build this year.
notes: among vs between: use 'between' for exactly two (between A and B); use 'among' for three or more, or for a group. among is followed by plural nouns or collective group nouns, not singular countable nouns.
recallQuestions: 那只在坚果堆里找不到出口的蚂蚁，对应哪个英文单词？
'在三个或更多事物之间'应该用 among 还是 between？
用 among 写一句和你工作或学习有关的英文句子。
